name: Ricardo Langdon
title: DevOps Engineer | Cloud Infrastructure Architect | Platform Engineering
base_skills: Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, EKS, ECS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, S3, RDS, CloudFront, Route 53, Control Tower, Macie, Config, WAF), Azure (AKS, AD, Blob, Defender), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run, BigQuery)
IaC & Configuration Management: Terraform, Ansible, Pulumi, CloudFormation, Packer
Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes, Helm, Kustomize, ArgoCD, Flux, Docker
CI/CD & GitOps: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, Flux CD
Observability & SRE: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Loki, OpenTelemetry, PagerDuty
Security & Compliance: Zero-trust architecture, Vault, Snyk, Trivy, OPA, IAM, WAF
Networking: VPC, DNS, PrivateLink, Nginx, Envoy, SSL/TLS
Databases & Messaging: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ
Platform & Tools: Backstage, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Confluence, Datadog

experience.title: Senior Software Security Engineer / DevSecOps Lead
base_bullets: Led DevOps and DevSecOps practices across cloud-native platforms using AWS and Azure, improving system reliability and deployment consistency.
Designed and maintained multi-cloud infrastructure supporting high-availability production systems.
Built and optimized CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Jenkins, integrating security scanning and automated testing.
Implemented Kubernetes-based platforms (EKS, AKS) to support containerized microservices and scalable workloads.
Managed infrastructure using Terraform, enabling automated provisioning across environments.
Applied security best practices including IAM policies, HashiCorp Vault, and vulnerability scanning tools (Snyk, Trivy).
Improved system observability using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack for monitoring, logging, and alerting.
Reduced security risks through automated vulnerability detection and remediation processes.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve deployment workflows, release cycles, and system stability.
Supported incident response and system monitoring, ensuring high availability and rapid issue resolution.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer / Cloud Engineer / Platform Engineer
base_bullets: Built and maintained DevOps pipelines for microservices-based applications using Jenkins and Git workflows.
Implemented CI/CD processes with automated build, testing, and deployment pipelines.
Managed cloud infrastructure on AWS including EC2, VPC, IAM, and RDS services.
Configured monitoring and logging systems using ELK Stack and Grafana to improve system visibility.
Applied security best practices including encryption, access control, and secure deployment strategies.
Automated infrastructure processes using Bash and Python scripting along with configuration tools.
Improved system performance and reliability through proactive monitoring and optimization.
Collaborated with engineering teams to deliver scalable and secure cloud-based applications.
Supported incident response and troubleshooting, resolving production issues efficiently.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer / Infrastructure Software Engineer
base_bullets: Built cloud infrastructure environments supporting distributed and scalable applications.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate application deployment and integration workflows.
Managed infrastructure configuration and deployment using automation tools and scripting.
Applied security practices including encryption, IAM, and secure access management.
Supported application deployment and monitoring processes across production environments.
Improved deployment workflows and system performance through process optimization.
Collaborated with engineering teams on system design, deployment, and integration.
Maintained infrastructure stability and reliability across live systems.
